# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create an Istio mesh configuration (meshConfig) that allows outbound traffic to any external service. Set outboundTrafficPolicy mode to ALLOW_ANY so services can call external APIs without ServiceEntry definitions. This provides maximum flexibility for microservices that integrate with various external APIs.
# Category: service_mesh_security

accessLogFormat: '{"start_time": "%START_TIME%", "duration": "%DURATION%", "connection_id": "%CONNECTION_ID%", "connection_serial_number": "%CONNECTION_SERIAL_NUMBER%", "request_id": "%REQ(X-REQUEST-ID)%", "remote_ip": "%REMOTE_IP%", "upstream_host": "%UPSTREAM_HOST%", "upstream_cluster": "%UPSTREAM_CLUSTER%", "downstream_local_address": "%DOWNSTREAM_LOCAL__ADDRESS%", "downstream_remote_address": "%DOWNSTREAM_REMOTE_ADDRESS%", "user_agent": "%REQ(USER-AGENT)%", "request_method": "%REQ(:METHOD)%", "request_url": "%REQ(X-ENVOY-ORIGINAL-PATH?:PATH)%", "protocol": "%PROTOCOL%", "response_code": "%RESPONSE_CODE%", "response_flags": "%RESPONSE_FLAGS%", "bytes_received": "%BYTES_RECEIVED%", "bytes_sent": "%BYTES_SENT%", "upstream_service_time": "%UPSTREAM_SERVICE_TIME%", "x_forwarded_for": "%REQ(X-FORWARDED-FOR)%", "istio_policy_status": "%ISTIO_POLICY_STATUS%", "upstream_transport_failure_reason": "%UPSTREAM_TRANSPORT_FAILURE_REASON%"}'
